title: The Simp
overview: Monty, an educated and nerdy young man passionate about intellectual pursuits, establishes an online connection with Amber, a self-centered and devious woman. Amber manipulates and exploits Monty for personal gain.

trailers.title: The Simp premiere will be 11/11/23 at the bel air movie theatre. Get your tickets on eventbrite just
